text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice a large crowd while headed to<n>the training
track and decide to go see<n>what's drawing all the
attention.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text: Challengers! Are you ready to<n>rumble?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Here come the representatives for<n>the Miho and
Ritto dorms! Taaake<n>your placeees!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. ♪ My dear sister, I may be<n>indebted to
you since you've always<n>helped me, but that
won't stop me<n>from giving this challenge my all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That's what I like to hear. Don't<n>expect me
to go easy on you either!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Go, Bright, go!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Ryan, let's see those muscles of<n>yours!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's a battle between the dorms!<n>Every once in a
while, the Miho and<n>Ritto dorms come together for
a<n>friendly tussle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's really all for show, but it's also<n>my chance to
prove to Ryan how<n>much I've grown, which is
why<n>losing isn't an option.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
All right! This time, our regularly<n>scheduled
dormitory showdown will<n>be a garbage disposal
race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Over here, we've got a mountain of<n>trash bags for
each dorm. The first<n>rep to take out all their trash
wins!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text: Challengers! On your marks! Get set...<n>GO!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah! My biceps and triceps are<n>singing!
Lemme grab some more!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Look at Mejiro Ryan employing her<n>muscles to
haul a huge number of<n>bags at once! She's so
fast!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Let's see how things are looking on<n>Mejiro
Bright's side!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oof. You bags looked so cute and<n>harmless all
snuggled up together, but<n>you're rather weighty,
aren't you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be struggling with the<n>unexpectedly
heavy load! We're<n>starting to see a gap form
between<n>the challengers' progress!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text: Hehe. We've got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text:
Lifting heavy things? Ryan was born<n>for this
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Phew... I'm halfway done! I'm way<n>ahead of
Bright, too!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(That doesn't mean I can slow down.<n>I know
Bright and she's not one to<n>give up.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(She might march at a slower pace<n>than everyone
else, but...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how far behind she falls,<n>she always
finds a way to close the<n>gap in the end.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't let my guard down! Not if I'm<n>gonna win
this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Wheeze... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it just me, or has Ryan's<n>pace slowed a
ton?

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I wonder what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sprinting back and forth with such<n>heavy loads
has turned into<n>anaerobic exercise, and the strain
is<n>gradually wearing away her<n>endurance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Bright, on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hup, hup, hup. Phew. I think I've<n>finally gotten the
hang of this.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Bright's still going at the same pace<n>she started!
This could be anyone's<n>win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Don't mind what's happening<n>around you and
just take things nice<n>and slow...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(I just have to focus on doing what I<n>can and
going at my own pace. So<n>long as I keep it up...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(The path will open. A bud will bloom.<n>Then I can
close the gap between<n>everyone ahead of me and
surpass<n>them...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(I made it this far by believing in<n>myself. That's
why...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The real challenge begins now, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bring it on! I won't lose to you, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe my eyes! They've<n>come
neck-and-neck, and they're<n>both on their last
garbage bag! But<n>who's going to make it back
first?!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Gooo, Ryaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: You can do this, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Coming in first by a sliver is Ryan!<n>Today's
victory goes to Miho<n>Dormitory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I lost by a single step. I was able to<n>put up a good
fight against Ryan, but...

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Nice work, Bright! You looked so cool<n>out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gathered spectators give them a<n>rowdy round
of applause, thoroughly<n>satisfied with their close
competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I should've known this would be the<n>outcome,
considering your strength<n>and speed, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The cumulation of all your daily hard<n>work really
paid off. My respect for<n>you has grown so much
deeper.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heheh. I could say the same to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I knew you were gonna come for me<n>in the end,
but I never expected you<n>to get that close!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You might have won this time, but I'll<n>turn the
tables in our next bout.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Which means I have to polish up my<n>garbage
disposal skills!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I know! I can start my new training by<n>carrying all
the garbage from Ritto<n>Dormitory. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you seriously starting your<n>training right
now?! Bright, you're<n>wild...
